title: Three candidates sought a district court position in Ada County. Two will advance to a November runoff.
description: ADA COUNTY — After this month’s primary election cycle, Ada County will have a singular judicial seat headed for a runoff election that will be decided in November.

title: Potsdam, Canton stay tied for NAC golf lead
description: Canton and Potsdam matched wins to remain tied for the NAC golf lead at 10-1 on Tuesday. Canton shaded Massena 222-223 and Potsdam downed Madrid-Waddington 211-286. Canton wins: Dan O’Neill posted a medalist 39, Jackson Zebedee came in at 43, Cole Lawrence finished at 44 and Will Mcdonough and Eliza Creurer each carded 48s as the Bears claimed a one-stroke win. Jacob Bailargeon’s 42 led ...

title: OFA girls advance past Potsdam in softball
description: OFA Girls Softball Coach Emma Ladouceur was very aware of the challenge ahead after her Lady Blue Devils downed Potsdam 14-2 Tuesday to advance into the Section 10 Class B semi-finals against top seeded Canton which posted a perfect record in NAC Central league play. But that was fine with her. “We know how tough a game it will be but we will just do our best and give all we have,” said Coach ...

title: High school baseball: Kloster steps in to boost Beaver River on mound in Section 3 playoff opener
description: BEAVER FALLS — Karter Kloster provided Beaver River with a big boost in their opener in the Section 3 baseball playoffs Tuesday. Kloster was summoned to the mound in the first inning after starting pitcher Ayshur Gerow was forced to leave after sustaining a potential injury to his pitching arm. Yet Kloster didn’t miss a beat in backing up his team as the pair, along with Cade Getman, combined ...

title: Soccer-Mateta strike hands Crystal Palace Conference League title
description: LEIPZIG, Germany, May ⁠27 (Reuters) - Crystal Palace claimed their first ⁠European trophy as Jean-Philippe Mateta's second-half ‌goal secured a 1-0 victory over Rayo Vallecano in the final of the Conference League on ​Wednesday, the perfect farewell for ⁠manager Oliver Glasner.
